title: Initial Consultation
subtitle: Meet your specialist
description: Your first consultation with our fertility specialist. We'll discuss your medical history, concerns, and create a personalized treatment plan.

title: Fertility Tests
subtitle: Understanding your health
description: Comprehensive fertility assessment including blood work, ultrasound, and genetic screening to understand your unique needs.

title: Treatment Plan
subtitle: Your personalized roadmap
description: Based on test results, your doctor will design a customized treatment plan tailored to your specific needs and goals.

title: Medication Cycle
subtitle: Preparing your body
description: Hormonal medications to stimulate egg production. Regular monitoring through blood tests and ultrasounds to track progress.

title: Egg Retrieval
subtitle: A minor procedure
description: A minor surgical procedure to collect mature eggs from your ovaries. Performed under light sedation by our experienced team.

title: Fertilization & Embryo Culture
subtitle: Creating new life
description: Your eggs are fertilized with sperm in our state-of-the-art lab. Embryos are carefully monitored as they develop over 5-6 days.

title: Embryo Transfer
subtitle: The final step
description: A gentle procedure where the healthiest embryo is placed into your uterus. Simple, painless, and over in minutes.

title: Pregnancy Test
subtitle: Waiting for results
description: Two weeks after transfer, a blood test will confirm whether the treatment was successful. Our team is with you every step of the way.
